name: ben-everly
description: My personal collection of Claude Code plugins

metadata.description: My personal collection of Claude Code plugins

plugins.name: development-workflow
plugins.description: A structured development workflow covering planning, design, implementation, review, and delivery

plugins.name: atlassian-tools
plugins.description: Atlassian CLI (acli) skills — currently covers Jira (JQL queries, ticket management, sprints, boards, comments, and workflow operations)

plugins.name: intelephense
plugins.description: PHP language server (Intelephense) for Claude Code with optimized file exclusions to reduce RAM usage

plugins.name: superpowers-artifacts
plugins.description: Route Superpowers spec artifacts to a pluggable backend (local file or Jira), scoped per-developer and per-project

plugins.name: conventional-branches
plugins.description: Name git branches following the Conventional Branch spec (type-first: feature/, bugfix/, hotfix/, release/, chore/)

plugins.name: ticket-branches
plugins.description: Name git branches after their ticket/issue id (ticket-first, slash-namespaced) for trunk-based development

plugins.name: git-flow
plugins.description: Name git branches and point PRs following the git flow model (git-flow CLI / Atlassian): feature/, bugfix/, release/, hotfix/ around main and develop
